passed_names: A1 — ambiguous yes: asks 'What can I help you with?' no tool call
CC — cancellation context: rebook cancelled → wrap_reschedule
HK — history check: 'Can I help?' already asked → no repeat
R2 — new booking different service → wrap_new_unknown
S3 — speak to practitioner: email relay offered, no tool call
SC — silence after question: asks 'Are you still there?'
SD — send details: SMS address request → send_details_to_caller
